3273020.name: Cone Crushers: Autocross
3273020.description:
About This Game:

CONE CRUSHERS: Autocross is a practical and immersive sandbox racing simcade game designed for autocross enthusiasts and casual drivers alike. Whether you're looking to hone your skills on tight, cone-filled tracks or take a break for a bit of joyriding, Cone Crushers offers a mix of precision racing and free roam exploration.

In addition to mastering challenging procedural autocross courses, you can take your finely-tuned vehicle for a spin through a small open world surrounding the event area, offering a small playground for free driving. Whether you're perfecting your lap times or simply enjoying the thrill of driving, Cone Crushers delivers a dynamic experience for everyone. As you progress you will unlock new locations and garages at which you can fill with your favorite vehicles, and appropriately outfit with tools, toolboxes and furniture. 

Key Features:

  • The Autocross Experience: Get lost in a sea of cones with ever-changing course layouts and unique vehicle physics. Navigate through tight obstacles like lane changes and Chicago boxes to test your driving skills.

  • Drive Anything With Wheels!: Cone Crushers isn't just about sports cars! Take control of an exciting variety of vehicles, each with unique physics and gameplay:

    • Monster Trucks - Crush through courses with massive wheels and suspension

    • RC Vehicles - Hit the skatepark for some flips and tricks

    • Trophy Trucks - Blast through dirt trails and catch some air

    • Hot dog cart - Become the glizzy king!

    • With more vehicles in game and with updates!

    Whether you're carefully navigating cones in a tuned sports car or manically smashing through them in a monster truck, every vehicle offers a completely different way to play!

  • Procedural Course Generation: Infinite course layouts to keep every race fresh and challenging. No two tracks are ever the same. 

  • Vehicle Customization & Tuning: Personalize and optimize your vehicle’s performance with a range of customization options, including wheels, tires, body paint, and tuning setups. Adjust spring length, strength, dampening and more. Unlock new engines, transmission and forced induction options. 

  • Unlock and Customize Garages: Outside the cone-filled tracks, as you progress, you will unlock new locations, amongst which will be new garages for you to store your vehicles and fill with cosmetics, such as tool boxes, lifts, floor jacks, etc. 

  • Course Design: Spawn cones to design and build your own autocross courses using the cone spawning tool. Assemble different layouts with custom obstacles to form your very own course to race on. 

  • CONE CRUSHERS: Autocross combines the skill-based precision of autocross racing with the freedom of vehicle customization and light exploration. Whether you're an autocross enthusiast aiming to perfect your craft or a casual driver looking for a new racing experience, Cone Crushers has something for everyone. Race through infinite procedural tracks, customize and fine-tune your vehicle, earn rewards and unlock new locations and garages that you can customize to your liking.

What is autocross?

Autocross is a timed motorsport competition where drivers navigate a course marked by cones, typically in a large parking lot, open space, or existing track. It emphasizes precision and handling over speed, with the goal of completing the course as quickly as possible without hitting cones. Vehicles are classed and times are calculated against an index that creates a level playing field for all vehicles, whether you are in a stock sedan or a full on supercar.  

At the heart of Cone Crushers is the desire to recreate the thrill of autocross racing while offering an open sandbox for players to experiment with any vehicle imaginable. The game provides a balance between authenticity and fun, ensuring that both novice and veteran racers can enjoy the gameplay. The focus on procedural track generation and vehicle diversity ensures endless replay-ability, while the open-world environment allows players to enjoy moments of free driving between races. When you need a break from perfecting cone runs, grab a monster truck for some destruction, take an RC car to the skatepark, or rally a trophy truck through the woods. At the end of the day, head back to your shop and cash in your winnings to order new parts and furniture to build your dream garage.
